Descricao: Lista de vendas de combustível sem CPF/CNPJ, sem cartão vinculado, agrupado por consumidor e combustível.
Query: SELECT EC.DAT_EMISSAO as DAT_EMISSAO, EC.NUM_NF as NUM_NF, EC.CHAVE_ACESSO as CHAVE_ACESSO, IEC.COMBUSTIVEL_ID as COMBUSTIVEL_ID, CC.DESCRICAO as DESCRICAO, IEC.PRC_UNITARIO as PRC_UNITARIO, IEC.QTDE as QTDE, IEC.VAL_BRUTO as VAL_BRUTO, EC.ECF_CONSUMIDOR_ID as ECF_CONSUMIDOR_ID FROM ECF_CONSUMIDOR EC INNER JOIN ITEM_ECF_CONSUMIDOR IEC ON (IEC.EMPRESA_ID = EC.EMPRESA_ID AND IEC.ECF_CONSUMIDOR_ID = EC.ECF_CONSUMIDOR_ID) INNER JOIN COMBUSTIVEL CC ON (CC.COMBUSTIVEL_ID = IEC.COMBUSTIVEL_ID) LEFT JOIN MOVIMENTO_CARTAO MC ON (MC.EMPRESA_ID = EC.EMPRESA_ID AND MC.ECF_CONSUMIDOR_ID = EC.ECF_CONSUMIDOR_ID) WHERE EC.EMPRESA_ID = @empresa_id AND IEC.COMBUSTIVEL_ID IS NOT NULL AND EC.DAT_MOVIMENTO BETWEEN @dataInicial AND @dataFinal AND MC.ECF_CONSUMIDOR_ID IS NULL AND EC.NUM_CPF_CNPJ IS NULL AND EC.PESSOA_ID IS NULL AND EC.EMPRESA_PESSOA_ID IS NULL
